entries.name: Foundation Gate
entries.description: Validates core workspace blueprints, matrix structures, and canonical formats.

entries.name: Journey Gate
entries.description: Validates transaction journeys, integration models, and simulation coverage.

entries.name: UI Kit Boundary Gate
entries.description: Enforces visual identity, raw colors constraints, and ui-kit limits.

entries.name: Fullstack Boundary Gate
entries.description: Enforces separation between backend models and frontend view presentation.

entries.name: WLT Financial Boundary Gate
entries.description: Enforces boundaries around financial records, wallet structures, and mutation paths.

entries.name: Runtime Config Gate
entries.description: Verifies correctness of Docker settings, ports, and environment files.

entries.name: No Broken Imports Gate
entries.description: Ensures all file imports resolve statically and do not reference missing dependencies.

entries.name: Cleanup Policy Gate
entries.description: Checks for local path patterns, legacy term markers, and deprecated guards.

entries.name: API Binding Gate
entries.description: Checks OpenAPI contract compatibility.

entries.name: Backend API Binding Gate
entries.description: Validates backend routing patterns against OpenAPI client generated mappings.

entries.name: Service Manifest Drift Gate
entries.description: Validates consistency between service manifests and actual backend structures.

entries.name: Frontend Feature Binding Gate
entries.description: Verifies that frontend screens are properly bound to shared controllers, OpenAPI spec operations, and backend routes across all operational slices.

entries.name: Go Routes CI Gate
entries.description: Extracts backend Go routes and checks for endpoint consistency.

entries.name: Logic Coverage Gate
entries.description: Checks logic flows, dead buttons, and unmapped client requests.

entries.name: A11y Gate
entries.description: Verifies accessibility elements statically (labels, roles).

entries.name: Dependency Graph Gate
entries.description: Verifies architectural layering and scopes circular warnings.

entries.name: AST Grep Rules Gate
entries.description: Checks structural AST compliance.

entries.name: UI Provider Required Gate
entries.description: Ensures components are wrapped inside UI Context Provider.

entries.name: Icon Contract Gate
entries.description: Checks visual assets and icon boundaries.

entries.name: Design Tokens Gate
entries.description: Checks raw layouts and warn on spacing anomalies.

entries.name: Brand Identity Report Gate
entries.description: Generates layout and colors report.

entries.name: Repository Size Gate
entries.description: Restricts forbidden files and large blobs from tracking.

entries.name: Repository Naming Gate
entries.description: Verifies naming patterns of components, routes, and migrations.

entries.name: Repository Structure Gate
entries.description: Verifies directory boundaries, depth levels, and import policies.

entries.name: Heavy Imports Gate
entries.description: Validates packages and import weights.

entries.name: Performance Budget Gate
entries.description: Validates performance budget definitions.

entries.name: Bundle Budget Gate
entries.description: Validates bundle sizing and dependencies.

entries.name: Governance Schema Gate
entries.description: Validates governance registry files (agents, skills, guards) against JSON schemas using Ajv.

entries.name: Agent Governance Gate
entries.description: Verifies workspace skills coherence, mandatory markdown headers, and AGENTS.md vs GEMINI.md policy consistency.

entries.name: Guard Registry Alignment Gate
entries.description: Verifies that all operational guards are registered and aligned across package.json, code, and CI workflows.

entries.name: Operational Journey Template Factory Gate
entries.description: Verifies the operational journey factory templates, generators, package bindings, output policy, and no-skip multi-surface rules.

entries.name: Markdown Governance Linter
entries.description: Checks governance documents and agent guides for Markdown styling rules using markdownlint-cli2.

entries.name: Secrets Detection Gate
entries.description: Audits the codebase for exposed passwords, keys, tokens, or configuration leaks using Gitleaks.

entries.name: Tool Catalog Coverage Gate
entries.description: Validates V5 tool catalog schema, unique ids, expected ids, and cross-file registration.

entries.name: Toolchain Activation Gate
entries.description: Verifies catalog/baseline consistency, script references, workflow references, and active/partial/optional semantics.

entries.name: OSS Toolchain Policy Gate
entries.description: Enforces open-source/free tool registration metadata.

entries.name: Workflow Syntax Lint
entries.description: Lints GitHub Actions workflow syntax using actionlint.

entries.name: Workflow Security Audit
entries.description: Audits GitHub Actions workflow security using zizmor.

entries.name: Actions Pinning Gate
entries.description: Checks GitHub Action pinning. Warn-only until action pinning baseline is accepted.

entries.name: Rego Policy Lint Gate
entries.description: Lints OPA Rego policies using Regal. Warn-only until policy lint baseline is accepted.

entries.name: OPA Policies Gate
entries.description: Runs Conftest/OPA policy checks against governance registries.

entries.name: Shell Script Lint Gate
entries.description: Checks shell/bash scripts with ShellCheck. Warn-only until shell baseline is accepted.

entries.name: Dockerfile Lint Gate
entries.description: Checks Dockerfiles with hadolint. Warn-only until Dockerfile baseline is accepted.

entries.name: YAML Config Lint Gate
entries.description: Checks YAML formatting with yamllint. Warn-only until YAML baseline is accepted.

entries.name: Accessibility Runtime Gate
entries.description: Runs dynamic accessibility checks on web routes using Playwright + axe-core.

entries.name: Repository Naming Lint
entries.description: Checks repository naming with ls-lint. Warn-only while legacy names remain.

entries.name: Foundation Cross-Journey Remediation Gate
entries.description: Verifies that cross-journey gaps are fully remediated or triaged.

entries.name: Operational Diagnostics Reconciliation Gate
entries.description: Enforces reconciliation of gaps and checks stale outputs and raw reports.

entries.name: DSH Order Lifecycle Execution Gate
entries.description: Verifies execution status, checks for open blocking gaps, and checks transition capabilities.

entries.name: Foundation Cross-Journey Closure Gate
entries.description: Verifies foundation cross-journey closure status and checks for open gaps.

entries.name: DSH Order Lifecycle All Gate
entries.description: Runs all DSH order lifecycle diagnostic and verification gates.
